_comment: Manual corrections applied AFTER the API fetch (override always wins and persists across fetches). Use when football-data.org reports a wrong score, or to show a just-finished match before the feed flips it to FINISHED. group format: {"<mid>": [home, away]}. ko format: {"<mid>": [homeES, awayES, homeGoals, awayGoals, advancingTeamES]}. Remove an entry once the source is correct/final. Current: mid 37 = Spain 4-0 Saudi Arabia (API wrongly reports 5-0); mid 41 = Argentina 2-0 Austria (shown early while API still IN_PLAY -- safe to remove once API marks it FINISHED 2-0).
